title: Data not binding due to language settings
symptom: Data fails to display on elements, regardless of static or dynamic content. The issue appears only in one project while another works fine.
applies_when: Using elements that require language settings
The project has multiple languages configured
not_this_if: The project has only one language enabled
The issue occurs in a different project with the same settings
root_cause: The error occurs when a language is referenced in the elements but is not enabled in the project settings. This can happen if a language is removed or added without proper configuration.
fix_steps: Open the page settings in the project
Check the list of available languages
Ensure that the required language (e.g., German) is added and enabled
Save the settings and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Verify and enable the necessary language in the page settings to allow data binding.
